ticket-quality.title: Ticket quality reviewer
ticket-quality.description: Reviews a ticket (or ticket graph) for clarity, acceptance criteria, scope, dependencies, and implementation risk. The default reviewer for the `review` operation.

code-quality.title: Code quality reviewer
code-quality.description: Reviews a code change (commits/diff) for correctness, bugs, edge cases, clarity, and maintainability. The default reviewer for the code-review operation.

security.title: Security reviewer
security.description: Looks for security-relevant concerns (authn/authz, secrets, input handling, injection, unsafe deserialization).

tests.title: Test-coverage reviewer
tests.description: Assesses whether changes are adequately covered by tests and flags missing edge cases.
